message.content:
@startuml
participant "User Agent" as UA
participant "Wallet" as Wallet
    participant "Frontend" as WF
    participant "Backend" as WB
    participant "Issuer" as Issuer
        participant "Metadata" as Meta
        participant "Web Site" as WS
        participant "Token Endpoint" as TE
        participant "Credential Endpoint" as CE

    UA -> WS: get credential

    note right of WS
        prepare credential issuance
    end note

    UA -> WS: Issuance Initiation Request
        (pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

    UA -> WS: Issuance Initiation Request
        (pre-authz-code, credential_type, expected_key_types, issuer)

    WB -> WB: gen DPoP key
    WB -> WB: gen DPoP proof for issuer token endpoint
    WB -> WB: get nonce (for app attestation)
    WB -> WB: nonce
    WB -> WB: obtain app attestation (nonce)
    WB -> WB: get assertion for code exchange (hash(pre-authz-code), app attestation)
    WB -> TE: check app_attestation
    WB -> WB: generate assertion (iss=wallet backend, pre_authz_code_hash, client_id)
    WB -> WB: assertion
    WB -> Meta: get issuer metadata
    WB -> TE: token request
        (pre-authz-code, pin, client_id, assertion, dpop_proof)

    note right of TE
        wallet authenticates with issuer as OAuth Client using the assertion issued by its backend (RFC 7523)
        issuer checks wallet backend id and key against trust registry
    end note

    note right of TE
        Token Endpoint validates pre-authorized code and creates corresponding access token
    end note

    WB -> TE: token response
        (access_token, c_nonce)
    WB -> WB: gen key : key, key_attestation
    WB -> WB: create proof of posssion (c_nonce)
    WB -> WB: create DPoP proof for issuance request
    WB -> CE: issue credential
        (access_token, credential_type, format, proof, key_policy, dpop_proof)

    note right of CE
        Credential Endpoint Token checks whether the access token is good for requested credential type and
        whether the proof of possession is valid
    end note

    WB -> UA: credential response (credential, format)

@enduml
